title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: s390utils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for s390utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The s390utils packages contain a set of user-space utilities that should be used together with the zSeries (s390) Linux kernel and device drivers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL9.6 crypto paes test failing when booting on S390  LPAR [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-103486)  RHEL10.0 - s390utils/s390-tools: Add IBM z17 machine type definitions (JIRA:RHEL-90166)

full_text:
An update for s390utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The s390utils packages contain a set of user-space utilities that should be used together with the zSeries (s390) Linux kernel and device drivers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL9.6 crypto paes test failing when booting on S390  LPAR [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-103486)  RHEL10.0 - s390utils/s390-tools: Add IBM z17 machine type definitions (JIRA:RHEL-90166)
